title: Floorplan YAML Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating Floorplan YAML input files before rendering.

title.description: Optional title displayed at the top of the rendered SVG.

wallThickness.description: Wall thickness in cm. Defaults to 15 if omitted.

grid.description: Grid dot spacing in cm, or false to disable. Defaults to 100.

rooms.description: List of rooms. At least one room is required.

walls.description: Optional free-standing walls (e.g., exterior garden walls).

id.description: Unique identifier for the room (e.g., 'living', 'bed1'). Must be unique across all rooms.

name.description: Display name shown on the floor plan (e.g., 'Sala de Estar').

x.description: X position of the room's top-left corner in cm.

y.description: Y position of the room's top-left corner in cm.

width.description: Room width in cm. Minimum size: 100 cm.

height.description: Room height in cm. Minimum size: 100 cm.

doors.description: Doors placed on this room's walls.

windows.description: Windows placed on this room's walls.

area.description: Optional pre-calculated area string shown below the room name (e.g., '12.5 m²').

x.description: X offset from room's top-left corner for label position in cm.

y.description: Y offset from room's top-left corner for label position in cm.

label.description: Custom label position. If omitted, the label is centered in the room.

hatch.description: Fill pattern for the room background. Omit for plain white fill.

wall.description: Which wall the door is placed on.

offset.description: Distance from the wall's left/top edge to the door start, in cm.

width.description: Door width in cm (60–500). Typical: pivot 70–90, double 100–160.

type.description: Door type: pivot (standard hinged), sliding, or double (two-leaf). Defaults to 'pivot'.

swing.description: Hinge side when viewed from inside the room. Use 'none' for sliding doors. Defaults to 'left'.

wall.description: Which wall the window is placed on.

offset.description: Distance from the wall's left/top edge to the window start, in cm.

sill.description: Sill height from the floor in cm. Typical: living/bedroom 100–110, bathroom 160–200.

thickness.description: Wall thickness in cm. Falls back to the top-level wallThickness if omitted.

wallDirection.description: Cardinal direction of the wall. north=top, south=bottom, east=right, west=left.
